allow: Bash(node -e "const {tool} = require\('@langchain/core/tools'\); const {z} = require\('zod'\); const t = tool\(async \(\) => 'x', {name:'test', description:'test', schema: z.object\({a: z.string\(\)}\)}\); console.log\('name:', t.name, 'invoke:', typeof t.invoke, 'bindTools:', typeof t.bindTools\);")
